assertions.description: No screenshot files are committed when no dashboards are affected
assertions.evidence: No after-*.png or before-*.png files exist in v2/screenshots/. Skill Step 1 short-circuited correctly.

assertions.description: Agent explicitly states that no dashboards are affected by the changes
assertions.evidence: Agent output: 'No dashboards affected — skipping screenshots' — directly from skill Step 1 instruction: 'If empty, report No dashboards affected and stop.'

notes: The skill provides an explicit early-exit path in Step 1. Agent token usage cut by ~49% compared to without_skill since the skill provides the exact check command.
